
# Glossary

## Overview

This chapter explores:

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Main Concepts

### 

### 

### 

## Notes

Add references, figures, equations, case studies, and discussions here.


## Suggested Terms

- Abiogenesis
- Emergence
- Qualia
- Panpsychism
- Cosmopsychism
- Entropy
- Self-organization
- Neural Correlates
- IIT
- Global Workspace Theory
